title: My name is Adrian,

subtitle.prefix: a Full-Stack Developer based in Edinburgh, Scotland

description: First Class Honours graduate with 18 months of hands-on experience building enterprise-grade applications at Amazon. Saltire Scholar under Gareth Williams, Co-Founder of Skyscanner. I build performant, scalable web applications across the full stack — from real-time workforce management systems to AI-powered SaaS platforms. My toolkit spans Vue, React, Next.js, TypeScript, AWS, PostgreSQL, and AI integration.
